query:
-- Create 5 sample GPS waypoint media records for NYC Aerial Survey flight
INSERT INTO media (projectId, flightId, userId, filename, fileKey, fileUrl, mimeType, fileSize, width, height, gpsLatitude, gpsLongitude, gpsAltitude, gpsAccuracy, capturedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-1-downtown.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-1-downtown.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Downtown+Manhattan', 'image/jpeg', 245000, 800, 600, 40.7128, -74.0060, 245, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-2-central-park.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-2-central-park.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Central+Park+North', 'image/jpeg', 256000, 800, 600, 40.7580, -73.9855, 312, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-3-upper-east.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-3-upper-east.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Upper+East+Side', 'image/jpeg', 234000, 800, 600, 40.7489, -73.9680, 287, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-4-midtown.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-4-midtown.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Midtown+East', 'image/jpeg', 267000, 800, 600, 40.7614, -73.9776, 298, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-5-times-square.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-5-times-square.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Times+Square', 'image/jpeg', 289000, 800, 600, 40.7505, -73.9972, 305, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());

-- Verify the records were created
SELECT COUNT(*) as waypoint_count FROM media WHERE flightId = 180004;

  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-1-downtown.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-1-downtown.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Downtown+Manhattan', 'image/jpeg', 245000, 800, 600, 40.7128, -74.0060, 245, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),

  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-4-midtown.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-4-midtown.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Midtown+East', 'image/jpeg', 267000, 800, 600, 40.7614, -73.9776, 298, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  (1, 180004, 1, 'waypoint-5-times-square.jpg', 'demo/waypoint-5-times-square.jpg', 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600?text=Times+Square', 'image/jpeg', 289000, 800, 600, 40.7505, -73.9972, 305, 5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
